headline: Paychex Shift To Broader HCM Platform Reframes Growth And Risk Profile
summary: Paychex is shifting its core offering from payroll processing to a broader human capital management platform. The company reports growth in its client base and strong retention rates as it expands deeper into HR outsourcing. This business model transition has not been widely discussed, despite its potential importance for NasdaqGS:PAYX shareholders. Paychex, trading on NasdaqGS:PAYX, is in the middle of a meaningful repositioning as it aims to be viewed less as a payroll vendor and more as...
